'''Ruan''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==Description==
Ruan was located on the [[Koros Trunk Line/Legends|Koros Trunk Line]], between [[Kaikielius/Legends|Kaikielius]] and [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="TEA" />

It was one of 18 [[Planet/Legends|planets]] controlled by the [[Salliche Agricultural Corporation]]. The majority of Ruan's surface was [[Farm/Legends|farmland]] tended to as closely as a park, and kept as neat. Besides its favorable axial tilt and soil quality, Ruan's [[Farmer/Legends|farming]] output was maximized by climate control, selective [[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] and crop engineering, and the use of labor [[Droid/Legends|droids]].<ref name="AoCII:JE" />

==History==
{{Quote|Salliche is desirous of refugees, child, but not for the camps. They want us in the fields.|[[R'vanna]]|<ref name="AoCII:JE" />}}
Ruan was originally a vassal colony of Kaikielius, but had achieved full Republic membership by [[11,000 BBY]].<ref name="praji">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/praji/20090205.html|text=Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji|int=Tinker, Tailor, Soldier, Praji}}</ref>

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Ruan was one of the few worlds to accept [[Refugee/Legends|refugees]]. In fact, Salliche Ag took extensive measures to dispose of machines and essentially prepare the world for the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invaders]]. Many refugees fled there, only to live in squalor. Most were employed as harvesters, substituting to the deactivated labor droids. This situation eventually led to a [[Droid uprising on Ruan|droid uprising]].<ref name="AoCII:JE" />

{{Planet-stub}}
